condition: The stakeholder register is present, mapped to C4-Q02, and contains identified interested parties and requirements.
criteria: The organisation shall determine interested parties relevant to the AIMS and the relevant requirements of those interested parties.
risk_statement: If stakeholder requirements are not maintained, the AIMS scope and governance controls may not reflect relevant obligations and expectations.
recommendation: Maintain the stakeholder register under document control and review it when material organisational or regulatory changes occur.
